site.name: Hays-Caldwell Amateur Radio Club (HCARC KE5LOT)
site.description: Amateur radio club serving Hays and Caldwell counties in Central Texas

pages.title: Home
pages.description: Home page for Hays-Caldwell Amateur Radio Club, serving amateur radio operators across Hays and Caldwell counties.

pages.description: Learn about Hays-Caldwell Amateur Radio Club, KE5LOT, including the club mission, meetings, officers, and brochure.

pages.description: View HCARC weekly activities, net control rotation, monthly meetings, and upcoming club events.
